Matthew 58 please retweet. 5 rules to live a happier life 1 Love yourself. 2 Do good. 3 Always forgive. 4 Harm no one. 5 Be positive. The only thing making you unhappy are your own thoughts. Change them. Today is not just another day. Its a new opportunity, another chance, a new beginning. Embrace it. The best revenge is to move on and get over it. Dont give someone the satisfaction of watching you suffer. Its not about having the perfect relationship, its about finding someone who matches you and will go through everything without giving up. Dont let stupid things break your happiness. The people who stick by you at your worst, deserve to enjoy being with you at your best. Never forget who was with you from the start. When something bad happens you have three choices You can either let it define you, let it destroy you, or you can let it strengthen you. If you still talk about it, you still care. Waking up every day is a blessing, not a privilege. Dont take it for granted. Life will get much better when you stop caring about what everyone thinks, and start to actually live for yourself. Dont worry about what you cant control. Always be thankful for everything you have. Life doesnt get easier, you just get stronger. Everything is better when you decide you dont care. The best way to avoid disappointment is to not expect anything from anyone. Loyalty is rare. If you find it, keep it. Theres no reason to look back when you have so much to look forward to. You cant go back and change the past, so look to the future and dont make the same mistake twice. Keep people in your life who truly love you, motivate you, and make you happy. If you know people who do none of these things, let them go. Always value who you are. Enjoy your uniqueness. Value yourself so people know your worth. You will never truly understand something until it actually happens to you. The smaller your circle is, the better. Your choice your responsibility win or lose, only you hold the keys to your destiny. Be thankful for everybody in your life, good and bad, past and present. They all made you the person that you are today. Stop caring what people think. Stop taking caution in your actions, listen to what you want, do what you want, this is your life. Live it. When you take things for granted, the things you are granted, get taken. Surround yourself with the people who make you better, and you will have better outcomes. Appreciate what you have right now, because you dont always get a second chance. Dont be so quick to believe what you hear because lies spread quicker than the truth. Let go of negativity. Worrying doesnt take away tomorrows troubles, it takes away todays peace. Dont ruin a good today by thinking about a bad yesterday. You cant change how people feel about you, so dont try. Just live your life and be happy. Once you replace negative thoughts with positive ones, youll start having positive results. The past is behind, learn from it. The future is ahead, prepare for it. The present is here, live it. If it doesnt add to your life, it doesnt belong in your life. When people tell you youve changed, its only because you stopped acting the way they want you to act. Dont feel sad over someone who gave up on you, feel sorry for them because they gave up on someone who would have never given up on them. Stop looking for reasons to be unhappy. Focus on the things you do have, and the reasons you should be happy. You never know how strong you are until being strong is the only choice you have. Words are useless without actions. Sometimes the only person you can trust is yourself. Dont waste time on revenge. The people who hurt you will eventually face their own karma.
